items.name: SATS-MINI
items.product_type: automatic parachute trigger/deployment system for drones

evidence.snippet:
### Auto & Manual
Deployment
Use the SATS-MINI to both manually deploy and automatically detect failure and actuate deployment. Additionally, all of our launchers allow the user to connect their own trigger system.

items.name: Raven On-Landing Parachute Release
items.product_type: mechanical automatic parachute release on landing for UAV/rocketry

evidence.snippet:
Raven On-Landing Parachute Release
==================================
Product Overview
----------------
The Raven On-Landing Parachute Release (ROPR) is a patent pending device that allows a parachute to be automatically released from a payload upon landing. This mitigates possible damage caused by wind that could otherwise drag a valuable payload after landing.

tagline: Manufactures ballistic and spring-actuated parachute recovery systems for drones and fixed-wing UAVs, including the Peregrine CO2 deployment platform, Skycat/Harrier launchers, SATS automatic triggers, and Iris Ultra canopies. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly disclosed. No major defense primes or government contracts identified in available sources.
